code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  mut current = ""
  mut result = ""
  mut has_last = false
  mut last = 0
  mut first_out = true
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_sep = true
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        if b == 32 or b == 9
          is_sep = true
        else
          is_sep = false
        end
      when None
        is_sep = true
      end
    end
    if is_sep
      if not string.is_empty(current)
        match string.parse_int(current)
        when Some(v)
          if not has_last or v != last
            if first_out
              result = "#{v}"
              first_out = false
            else
              result = "#{result} #{v}"
            end
            last = v
            has_last = true
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        current = ""
      end
    else
      match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(b)
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      when None
        ()
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end
